ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject in kilograms */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the signal type */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the signal type (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., ECG machine, blood pressure monitor) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the recording belongs to */,
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal type */,
  "recording_time" TEXT /* Date and time the recording was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the recording in seconds */,
  "sampling_rate" INTEGER /* Sampling rate of the recording in Hz */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality of the recording (e.g., good, poor, missing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_data" (
  "signal_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal data point */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the signal data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the signal data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the signal data point */,
  "artifact" INTEGER /* Whether the data point is an artifact (e.g., due to movement or equipment malfunction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_data_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation_time" TEXT /* Date and time the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recording_devices" (
  "recording_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recording device */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the device was used for */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the device was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recording_devices_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view recording) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., IP address, institution) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the feature was extracted from */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., time-domain, frequency-domain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_features_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used to train the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that made the prediction */,
  "recording_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recording the prediction was made on */,
  "prediction_time" TEXT /* Date and time the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
